movie.actors: Chris Pratt, Bryce Dallas Howard, Rafe Spall, Justice Smith
movie.plot: When the island's dormant volcano begins roaring to life, Owen and Claire mount a campaign to rescue the remaining dinosaurs from this extinction-level event.
movie.title: Jurassic World: Fallen Kingdom
movie.writer: Derek Connolly, Colin Trevorrow, Michael Crichton (based on characters created by)
